import { API_URL } from "../config";

export const  LOGIN = `${API_URL}/api/v1/login`
export const REGISTER = `${API_URL}/api/v1/register`
export const CREATE_TODO = `${API_URL}/api/v1/createTodo`
export const GET_ALL_TODOS = `${API_URL}/api/v1/getAllTodos`
export const DELETE_TODO = `${API_URL}/api/v1/deleteTodo`
export const MARK_TODO = `${API_URL}/api/v1/markTodo`
